text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at the library...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Zenno Rob Roy, I would like to borrow a book.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Pr-President! Why, welcome to the library...
Which book are you looking for?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The Twinkle Series Chronicle: Tamamo Cross, please.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and her trainer accomplished
astonishing feats in their first three years.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That alone warrants special mention, but the
legacy that followed is of equal note.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Wha?! What da heck is the "Eternal Top Three"?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: That's what they're calling you guys?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Seems that way. There's me from Kasamatsu,
and...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Inari One representin' Oi! I've been runnin' 'round
the Keihin canal since I first learned to stand!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And then there's me, Super Creek. Apparently,
we're often seen as quite the close-knit trio.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now hold on—who said trio?! How come they're leavin' me out of this Eternal Top Three thing?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to speed, White Lightnin's got you
all beat. If you wanna be on top, ya gotta beat
me first!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted! Better brace yourself though, 'cause you're in for a real whoopin'!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Wherever those Umamusume went, success was
sure to follow. Their sheer energy was too intense
for Tracen Academy to contain...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It radiated beyond even the racecourse, and
quite literally changed the course of history.

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, ever heard of the Twinkle Series? I'm seeing
stuff about it everywhere I look nowadays.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap really are
something, aren't they? I'd love to go see them
race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even those with no previous interest in racing
were turning their heads, and the widespread
passion they inspired in their fans extended even
to the next generation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross and Oguri Cap. Both went from
humble beginnings to groundbreaking fame...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How wonderful. And I guarantee I too will reach
those heights. Just you wait until next year, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It'll be time for us to debut too! One day,
we'll be up against Oguri Cap!

Hehe, is it finally my time to shine? Yep, the only
racer around here who's got what it takes to
overtake those awesome racers...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Is yours truly! ♪ Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The tracks left by Tamamo Cross do not tell the
tale of an ordinary racer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Her extraordinary progress led the way to a
golden age for the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's how the history books speak of her
exploits...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The exploits of White Lightning, the racer who
cleared the path to a new era. And her story
doesn't end there.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Phewww, Trainer. Every day's a struggle. With this
many people showin' up, it's like we're throwin'
some kinda party.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But it's thanks to the fans I can run happy 'n
healthy. And thanks to you, too.
choice_data_list: Oh, I should be thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let's just call it even and keep workin' hard!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You're what's kept me goin' through thick and
thin. You and...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mom, Dad... I hope you two are proud. Thank you
for passin' your dreams onto me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I am who I am right now 'cause you two brought
me into the world.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No matter how tough things got, ya kept me
dreamin'. That's why I'm standin' here today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Looks like the fans are out in full force at the
track today. Y'know, in the beginnin', I never
really got what fans were about, but it's clear to
me now.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Fans aren't customers. They've always been here
watchin' over me. Cheerin' me on and keepin' my
legacy goin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
My fans are runnin' with me. And even if one day I
can't run anymore, I know we'll still be walkin'
together...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And those fans, they talk to their friends 'n their
kids—tell 'em about this one Umamusume who
outran adversity itself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Mom, Dad. I promise ya. I'll keep your dream
alive forever.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And I'll keep on runnin'. Doesn't matter where.
Could be at a racecourse, could be anywhere.
'Cause wherever it is, I'll be runnin' free.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And that's 'cause...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The path I made to my dreams isn't goin'
anywhere. This bolt's gonna keep lightin' the way
forward. And the thunder that follows is gonna
rumble for centuries.
